params.description: Horizontal bar graph appears titled 'Votes for Field Trip'. Five categories listed vertically on left: Zoo, Museum, Park, Aquarium, Theater. Bars extend horizontally from left to right with values Zoo=45, Museum=30, Park=55, Aquarium=40, Theater=35. Scale of 10, axis along bottom 0–60. Ghost gridlines at 5s visible.

beats.text: This bar graph is HORIZONTAL. The bars go sideways, but you read them the same way—finding where the bar ends on the scale.

elements.description: Horizontal bar graph titled 'Votes for Field Trip' showing five categories with complete bars. Scale of 10, axis 0–60 along bottom.

params.description: Zoo bar highlights to demonstrate reading strategy.

beats.text: Zoo's bar extends to 45. Between 40 and 50—halfway. What value does the Museum bar show?
What value does the Museum bar show?

validator.description: Student selected 30, correct value for Museum bar

params.description: Museum bar highlights to confirm selection.

beats.text: 30. The bar ends right at the 30 line.

elements.description: Horizontal bar graph titled 'Votes for Field Trip'. Museum bar highlighted at value 30. Five categories with complete bars, scale of 10, axis 0–60 along bottom.
